INVESTMENT SERVICES ACT (UCITS ADMINISTRATIVE
PENALTIES, MEASURES AND INVESTIGATORY POWERS)

[ L.S.370.33

LEĠISLAZZJONI SUSSIDJARJA 370.33
REGOLAMENTI DWAR UCITS ADMINISTRATIVE
PENALTIES, MEASURES AND INVESTIGATORY
POWERS (INVESTMENT SERVICES ACT)*
5 ta’ April, 2016
L-AVVIŻ LEGALI 115 tal-2016, kif emendat bl-Avviż Legali 222 tal2016.

*Dawn ir regolamenti ġre ippubblikati bl-ilsien Ingliż biss.
